EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeographicCoordinateSystem

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control access to all properties of geographic coordinate systems.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("40870D80-1DD2-11B2-BF4C-08002022F573")]
public interface IGeographicCoordinateSystem : ISpatialReference, ISpatialReferenceInfo

The angular unit of this geographic coordinate system.
